verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, my shepherd and only provider He makes me lie down in green pastures He leads me besides the still waters He restore my soul

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Surely goodness and mercy will follow Me all the days of my life And I will dwell in is house forever till the end of time

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus, my shepherd and only provider He makes me lie down in green pastures He leads me besides the still waters He restore my soul

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Though I walk through the valley of shadows I will not be afraid Your rod and staff are my only comfort And you'll be with me always

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You prepare a table before me in the Presence of my enemies And you anoint my head with oil And my cup overflows My cup overflows with your love With you love

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Jesus, my shepherd and only provider He makes me lie down in green pastures He leads me besides the still waters He restore my soul
